---
title: "Scientific UAV Hardware"
id: module-hs
order: 50
summary: "The market for drones and the associated control and evaluation software is virtually unmanageable and requires constant readjustment to the application requirements and technical possibilities."
Goals:
  - module-goals-hs
materials:
  - material-hs-0
  - material-hs-1
  - material-hs-2
activities: []
assessments:
  - assessment-hs
labels:
  - Basic Information
published: true
title-block-banner: ../images/module-prerequisites/oss.jpeg
title-block-banner-color: black
listing:
  - id: module-module-goals
    contents: "../module-goals/*.qmd"
    type: custom
    template: "../_templates/module-cards.ejs.md"
    template-params:
      module_id: module-introduction
      heading: "Goals"

  - id: module-materials
    contents: "../materials/*.qmd"
    type: custom
    template: "../_templates/module-cards.ejs.md"
    template-params:
      module_id: module-introduction
      heading: "Materials"

  - id: module-activities
    contents: "../activities/*.qmd"
    type: custom
    template: "../_templates/module-cards.ejs.md"
    template-params:
      module_id: module-introduction
      heading: "Activities"

  - id: module-assessments
    contents: "../assessments/*.qmd"
    type: custom
    template: "../_templates/module-cards.ejs.md"
    template-params:
      module_id: module-introduction
      heading: "Assessments"
---



::: {#module-module-goals}
:::

::: {#module-materials}
:::

::: {#module-activities}
:::

::: {#module-assessments}
:::
